_comment: Copy this file to data/profile/my_projects.json — data/profile/ is gitignored.
_instructions: Add any project NOT on GitHub, or any project you want to describe manually.
highlights (CV bullet points), github_url (null if not on GitHub), period.

name: Example Project Without GitHub
description: A brief description of what this project does and the problem it solves.
highlights: Built a REST API handling 10k+ daily requests
Reduced processing time by 40% via Redis caching
Deployed on AWS EC2 with auto-scaling

name: Example Project With Manual Description
description: Even if a project IS on GitHub, you can describe it here to control the CV bullet points exactly.
highlights: Built a RAG pipeline over 50k+ documents with sub-200ms retrieval
Achieved 92% answer accuracy on internal benchmark
